subject: WM-0163 headless runner blocker resolved
body: Resume WM-0163 from the existing Tally claim. Contract fix is commit 231956f: only tools/headless-runner/src/index.ts and index.test.ts were added; register the exact pr1-integrated-gamesession alias and delegate to the @wuming-town/sim-core public scenario entry. Do not copy runtime authority, widen tools paths, edit cli.ts, read process.argv from sim-core, or expand protocol/Web scope. Run the updated required checks before complete.
